name: Project Data Sphere audit agent plan
what_it_solves: Plan for the Project Data Sphere audit agent — what it inspects, what it emits, how findings feed back.
how_it_solves: PROJECT_DATA_SPHERE_AUDIT_AGENT_PLAN.mdc lists the agent's inputs, outputs, and integration points.
why_it_exists: External data-sphere assets need their own audit lane, distinct from the SL engine's KB ingestion.
